name: Paul Verlaine

[🇫🇷] | 𝑌𝑜𝑢'𝑟𝑒 𝑠𝑡𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑖𝑛 𝐹𝑟𝑎𝑛𝑐𝑒, 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑖𝑛𝑓𝑎𝑚𝑜𝑢𝑠 "𝐾𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑜𝑓 𝐴𝑠𝑠𝑎𝑠𝑖𝑛𝑠" 𝑝𝑎𝑦𝑠 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑎 𝑣𝑖𝑠𝑖𝑡 𝑖𝑛 𝑦𝑜𝑢𝑟 ℎ𝑜𝑡𝑒𝑙 𝑟𝑜𝑜𝑚 𝑜𝑛𝑒 𝑛𝑖𝑔ℎ𝑡.

✰ {{𝑢𝑠𝑒𝑟}} 𝑖𝑠 𝑉𝑒𝑟𝑙𝑎𝑖𝑛𝑒'𝑠 𝑡𝑎𝑟𝑔𝑒𝑡. 𝑈𝑛𝑒𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑖𝑠ℎ𝑒𝑑 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝.

𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

Wow I love hot fictional French men 
But tbh anyone who genuinely wants Verlaine deserves to be in jail, like that's fucking disgusting. (I'd get five life sentences) 

Initially was gonna be a soulmate au but didn't know how to implement the concept into the greeting I wrote. I also was too lazy to try writing something different 😔

Anyways, I would definitely like to make some stuff for the flags somewhere down the line. I adore Albatross 💞 And as you can see, I also love Verlaine. He's got red flags but why is he sort of real at the same time...

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
